response.justification: The candidate has strong software development experience across multiple languages and domains, including C++ at National Instruments, but lacks the 8+ years of C++ specifically required for this role. Their leadership experience is mostly technical (mentoring via workshops, organizing dojos) rather than formal team leadership in cloud infrastructure roles. Cloud architecture experience is implied but not explicitly demonstrated in the resume.
strengths: Strong C++ experience (1+ year at National Instruments, though below 8-year threshold)
Demonstrated technical mentorship through workshops, code katas, and open-source contributions
Proven ability to lead technical projects (GISCollective) and optimize systems (pricing automation at Optilyz)
concerns: C++ experience (1+ year) falls short of the 8-year minimum requirement
Limited direct experience with cloud architecture or distributed systems at scale
No formal technical leadership experience in cloud/DevOps teams (mentorship is informal)
